feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 63 agents, 249 skills, 79 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: yasunori0418-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills (Claude Code / Codex) following the agentskills.io standard.

entry.title: vaaya
entry.content: Paid superpowers for any agent: media & video generation, product demo videos, web search & scraping, deep/market research, GTM & sales enrichment, code sandboxes, browser automation, email, memory — pay-per-call, no API keys.

entry.title: couchbase
entry.content: Official Couchbase plugin (MCP Server + Skills). Connect to a live Couchbase cluster, explore data, write and run SQL++ queries, optimize queries and GSI indexes, and design data models — grounded in your real cluster via the Couchbase MCP server.

entry.title: theorems-harness-product
entry.content: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: azure
entry.content: Microsoft Azure MCP integration for cloud resource management, deployments, and Azure services. Manage your Azure infrastructure, monitor applications, and deploy resources directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: claude-hud
entry.content: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: astramem
entry.content: Slash commands + auto-capture hooks bridging Claude Code to AstraMemory. Provider selector routes between local and SaaS backends. Bun-native TypeScript CLI. Fail-silent ingest log. Bearer scrubbing at every output sink.

entry.title: workspace
entry.content: Solo entrepreneur workspace with Mission Control task management, Eisenhower matrix, and AI agent team operations

entry.title: linkedin-skills
entry.content: 10 Claude Code and Codex skills for LinkedIn marketing: post writing, comment drafting, reply handler, hook extractor, humanizer (rewrite + audit + emoji + detector + rules sub-tools), profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, thread monitor (author replies), engager analytics (likers + commenters ICP segmentation).

entry.title: agmsg
entry.content: Cross-agent messaging via SQLite. Send messages between CLI AI agents. No daemon, no network.

entry.title: clawness
entry.content: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 120 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + RRF + concept expansion, pure Python), a per-codebase lessons-learned memory injected every turn, Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate, and session security hardening (an access guard that forces a prompt on likely exfiltration/destructive tool calls, and a trust ledger that flags changed skills/agents). No Docker, no services, no ML models. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs PyYAML (the only dependency) into your environment.

entry.title: code-review-graph
entry.content: Persistent incremental knowledge graph for token-efficient, context-aware code reviews with Claude Code

entry.title: kr-research-kit
entry.content: AI-native Korean + U.S. equity research skill pack — DART filings, SEC EDGAR/XBRL, sell-side consensus, foreign-IB coverage, 5-panel charts, daily market news, and Naver-blog publishing. Primary-source-first.

entry.title: daisyui
entry.content: Official daisyUI component library skill. The mandatory UI library for Tailwind CSS. TRIGGER when generating any HTML or JSX code even if the user does not explicitly ask for this skill.

entry.title: react-native-ease
entry.content: Declarative native animations for React Native — migration tools

entry.title: cc-hooks-plugin
entry.content: Audio feedback system with multilingual TTS announcements, AI-powered contextual messages, and sound effects for Claude Code. Transform your coding experience with intelligent voice feedback that keeps you informed without breaking your flow.

entry.title: sf-security-review-toolkit
entry.content: Skills that prepare an ISV partner for the AppExchange/AgentExchange security review end to end — autonomous multi-agent codebase audit, submission-artifact generation, scan orchestration, test-environment runbooks, and an honest readiness verdict.

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. Ships 4 skills (deep-research, academic-paper, academic-paper-reviewer, academic-pipeline) covering 35+ modes, 32-agent ensemble, Material Passport handoff schema, v3.6.7 cross-model audit gate (synthesis + research-architect + report-compiler pattern protection layer), and v3.6.8 generator-evaluator contract for paper drafting.

entry.title: plur
entry.content: Persistent, local-first shared memory for AI agents. Corrections, preferences, and conventions persist across sessions, tools, and machines — stored as plain YAML on your disk, with zero-cost local search.

entry.title: cmux-team
entry.content: Multi-agent development orchestration with Claude Code + cmux. Spawn, monitor, and integrate parallel sub-agents visually in terminal panes.

entry.title: finyx
entry.content: AI-powered personal finance advisor for Germany and Brazil

entry.title: ccc-tools
entry.content: Claude Code integration for cocoindex-code (ccc). Slash commands for onboarding, reset, and re-index; git hook installer for automatic incremental indexing; standard exclude presets that avoid common retrieval noise (tests, plans, compiled views, ML embedding data).

entry.title: qiushi-skill
entry.content: Qiushi Skill: methodology skills for AI agents guided by seeking truth from facts, with Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Codex, OpenCode, and Hermes guidance.

entry.title: rka
entry.content: Research Knowledge Agent (RKA) integration for Claude Code. Connects Claude to a local RKA backend for provenance-tracked research workflows: journal entries, decisions, literature, missions, claims, evidence clusters, and a research graph shared across the three-actor model (Brain in Claude Desktop, Executor in Claude Code, PI human researcher). Activates on RKA, research notes, knowledge graph, decisions, missions, journal entries, evidence clusters, literature management, citing literature, organizing research, tracking provenance, knowledge base.

entry.title: cc-messagebus
entry.content: Cross-session message bus for Claude Code with central observability

entry.title: uberclaw
entry.content: Mission-driven multi-Claude orchestrator: spawn, coordinate, and budget child Claude Code sessions from a single source of truth.

entry.title: task-tracker
entry.content: Obsidian-backed task + idea tracker with motivation-aware coaching surface

entry.title: glassbox-harness
entry.content: Harness tooling for building Glassbox under its own observation: guardrail hooks (no-network, no-raw-transcript, verify-on-stop, tool-use log, session-start), the schema-investigator / slice-implementer / metric-author agents, repo skills, and dev-time-only MCP servers. Enforces the no-network, zero-dependency, single-boundary rules (OBJ-5).

entry.title: ak
entry.content: AlgoKiller — ARM64 trace evidence analysis & cipher algorithm recovery. Bundles the AlgoKiller methodology as skills + a local MCP server (28 tools) that drives the native ak_search engine over GB-scale trace files. v1.2.0 adds two trace tools targeted at OLLVM-flattened binaries — `trace_function` (PC-level invocation analyzer with depth-counter ret boundary, replaces manual trace_search + trace_context loop for stripped helpers) and `trace_immseq` (anchor-driven prev_reg sequence extraction, recovers table-consumption order from jump-table-dispatcher functions). Formalizes R9 (`regN=X -> regN=Y` prev/new semantics — single most common LLM misread in obfuscated code) and FIX #8 (algorithm-name claims require trace_cryptoinstr/trace_constscan/trace_immseq/trace_function fingerprint corroboration before conclude(>=medium)). Loosens five over-strict gates: trace_search limit 100→500, B2 same-args rule exempts hint-driven fallback paths, cross-session [H<n>] references become non-blocking warnings instead of hard errors. Tests 128 → 149 PASS.

entry.title: crypto-trading-desk
entry.content: Multi-agent cryptocurrency intelligence system with 7 specialized AI agents, 65 MCP tools, cognitive learning, and self-evolving capabilities for comprehensive market analysis and paper trading.

entry.title: claude-chillbro
entry.content: Auto-approves obviously-safe Bash commands so Claude Code stops asking permission for every grep, cat, and ls. Static allowlist (read-only ops), static asklist (destructive ops), self-learning (commands you've approved twice get auto-approved next time), and a headless 'claude -p' classifier as a last-resort fallback for unknown commands.

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Multi-agent task decomposition and coordination for Claude Code

entry.title: oh-my-harness
entry.content: Spec-driven autonomous Claude Code harness — autonomous loop with self/cross-verification, weight-aware routing & multi-model independent verify, smart defaults, test enforcement, model routing

entry.title: using-cmux
entry.content: Skill for operating cmux terminal multiplexer. Pane splitting, sub-agent spawning/monitoring/result collection, command sending, screen reading, and notifications.

entry.title: domain-research
entry.content: Universal research framework with conversational intent analysis - works for any field

entry.title: coherence
entry.content: Detects documentation-vs-code drift and proposes surgical patches

entry.title: pdf-research
entry.content: LightRAG-based PDF document indexing and semantic search for research workflows

entry.title: codesage-tools
entry.content: Claude Code integration for CodeSage, a Rust-based code intelligence engine. Provides slash commands for onboarding a project (init + index + global MCP registration + git hooks + agent hint), reset, incremental reindex with model-mismatch cleanup, and retrieval benchmarking. A single global MCP server serves every onboarded project, routed by an absolute `project` argument on each call.

entry.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entry.content: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).

entry.title: create-general-agent
entry.content: Create ONE self-contained personal AI agent in its own folder, with a two-part brain: Claude Code file-based memory plus a knowledge base built with Andrej Karpathy's LLM-wiki method (append-only raw/ + distilled wiki/ with backlinks). The agent is standalone and reports to no one. Bundles tm-send, a hardened tmux send-keys for optional inter-agent messaging.

entry.title: oh-my-obsidian
entry.content: Give your AI coding agent a permanent second brain. Connect Claude Code to an Obsidian vault to auto-record decisions, instantly recall project context, and orchestrate automated refactoring for your team's knowledge base.

entry.title: codeharness
entry.content: Makes autonomous coding agents produce software that actually works — real-world verification, observability, and mechanical enforcement via Claude Code hooks.

entry.title: status-pipe
entry.content: Baseline, repo-agnostic agent workflow emitting the status-pipe protocol (.status-pipe/): orchestration ticks, per-ticket/epic workers, ack-inbox consumption, and the trust-gated comment gateway. Reference writer for the status-pipe VS Code extension.

entry.title: curiosity-stack
entry.content: A structured research thinking tool for enterprise professionals and investors. Decode any technology or market signal into 2nd and 3rd order business insights using layer-by-layer question sequencing. Not investment advice. For research and learning purposes only.

entry.title: arbor
entry.content: Run Arbor's hypothesis-tree research workflow inside Claude Code using your own model — no API key. Bundles the Arbor Agent Skill suite and registers the keyless `arbor mcp` tools (Idea Tree, evaluation, worktrees, guarded merges, reports).

entry.title: claude-code-wakatime
entry.content: WakaTime plugin for Claude Code - Track your AI usage, lines of code generated, and time spent prompting AI

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: cad
entry.content: CAD, robotics, fabrication, and local review skills.

entry.title: subtext
entry.content: Tools for agents to build with Subtext

entry.title: taste-skill
entry.content: Frontend design taste skills including brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, and more

entry.title: bifrost-plugin
entry.content: Bifrost MCP gateway plugin for Claude Code: memory auto-injection, skill discovery, one-command onboarding.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Skills, agents, hooks, and lint gates that install into any repo and gate code from write to merge.

entry.title: claude-code-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC orchestration for Claude Code + one-command install of the full delivery harness (governance CLAUDE.md, five CI gates, Stop/review hooks, build-loop agents & skills, IaC starters).

entry.title: easyrunner-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for driving EasyRunner (the single-server self-hosting PaaS) without learning the er CLI. Covers server provisioning plus er app repo prep, app create, deploy, and update.

entry.title: resonance
entry.content: An operator-grade AI skill stack for builders. Elite, domain-tested skills and structured /commands for every stage of the product lifecycle: strategy, design, engineering, marketing, sales, and ops. Cross-tool: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, opencode.

entry.title: xcode-build-skills
entry.content: A multi-skill plugin for benchmarking and optimizing Xcode builds, compile hotspots, project settings, and Swift Package Manager dependency overhead.

entry.title: tcw
entry.content: Taxonomy · Capabilities · Work — a storage-abstracted framework for describing and evolving a software project, with skills that drive the tcw CLI.

entry.title: amber-protocol
entry.content: Amber Protocol: repository-local governance kit for coding agents — init, audit, wiki, doctor, and handoff workflows.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: ccp
entry.content: Claude Code Profile Manager — manage multiple Claude Code configurations via a central hub

entry.title: project-with-reflect
entry.content: A multi-agent meta-skill for Codex, Claude Code, and other coding agents. It turns each project, machine, device, API, and MCP server into a lightweight, self-improving skill: work through /<project>, auto-log moments that matter, and reflect logs into lean lessons so the next session starts smarter.

entry.title: redpanda-connect
entry.content: Interactive YAML config and Bloblang authoring for Redpanda Connect

entry.title: amplemarket
entry.content: Sales and GTM skills for prospecting, account research, pipeline review, coaching, deliverability, and outreach. Requires the Amplemarket MCP server or connector.

entry.title: 8colors-process-engine
entry.content: Portable Claude Code process engine — 21 agents, 10 commands, 2 session skills, cross-platform schedulers, multi-provider RAG with FTS5 hybrid retrieval, deterministic quality/security gates, and A6 SaaS domain modules (auth + tenancy + api-credentials + billing). Enforcement is deterministic, not prompt-hope.

entry.title: homelab-core
entry.content: Core homelab agents, commands, and setup/health skills for self-hosted service management. Includes interactive credential setup wizard and unified service health dashboard.

entry.title: arcade
entry.content: Dynamic tool discovery and execution across 500+ Arcade tools (Slack, Gmail, GitHub, Google Calendar, Notion, Linear, Dropbox, and more) over a single MCP connection. Ships an operator subagent, skills, and slash commands so the discovery loop stays out of your main conversation.

entry.title: quartermaster
entry.content: Non-destructive skill lifecycle manager. Compiles a per-project loadout, then demotes and hides unused skills to keep context lean — never deletes without your approval.

entry.title: deepline
entry.content: Deepline GTM skills and CLI for Claude Code (laptop and Cowork sandboxes).

entry.title: mad
entry.content: mad (MultiAgent Decanting) — orquestração multi-agente em modo decanting nativo do Claude Code. O Arquiteto coordena especialistas via Agent tool (sem claude -p, sem processos em background); cada feature é uma sessão viva que externaliza aprendizado obrigatoriamente ao fim (decanting). Memória institucional em arquivo, trust ladder por agente, guardrails proporcionais ao blast radius, dashboard HTML local cross-platform e telemetria OpenTelemetry GenAI. Thin wrapper sobre Claude Code: Windows nativo, macOS e Linux.

entry.title: quasi
entry.content: Academic research toolkit — search, download, extract, analyze, synthesize

entry.title: elixir-dev
entry.content: Elixir/Phoenix development: skills, hooks (format/compile/credo), and LSP integration

entry.title: pygraphistry-core-pack
entry.content: PyGraphistry workflows for auth, shaping, GFQL, visualization, AI, and connectors

entry.title: polyforge
entry.content: polyforge v1 — Go-native multi-agent AI coding coordination. Implements Iron Rules (IR1-IR4), three-layer L1/L2/L3 architecture, and the full wi lifecycle (work/stop/status/spec/plan/execute/retro).

entry.title: material-3
entry.content: Material Design 3 (Material You) implementation skill for Jetpack Compose, Flutter, and web.

entry.title: claude-tokenstein
entry.content: Track and report Claude token usage from local logs and the Anthropic Admin API

entry.title: autopilot
entry.content: Execution autonome : roadmap → objectifs → taches. Fusionne orchestration (task queue SQLite), memoire partagee (blackboard .md), et agents adaptatifs.

entry.title: codeaware
entry.content: AI comprehensibility analyzer for code — 6-level scale diagnosis with hidden context detection and improvement roadmap. AI가 코드를 얼마나 안전하게 이해/수정할 수 있는지 6단계 척도로 진단하고, 숨은 맥락을 탐지하여 개선 로드맵을 제시하는 MCP 서버.

entry.title: lorenzos-claude-code
entry.content: Stack-focused Claude Code plugin for Next.js + React + Supabase. Scaffolds components, API routes, hooks, Supabase types, and Edge Functions. Composes with superpowers.

entry.title: bean
entry.content: Run a task as a recursive convergence loop: investigate the most decisive open question, record evidence in a claim ledger, let a compiler score what is still weak or contradictory, revise beliefs, and loop until it converges. Runs on grainulator/wheat (or a built-in ledger). Verbose by default.

entry.title: elixir-lsp
entry.content: Elixir Language Server integration for Claude Code

entry.title: guild
entry.content: Spec-first workflows and specialized agent roles for Claude Code. Design docs before code, structured deliberation, automatic previous-session recap on startup.

entry.title: super-gsd
entry.content: Orchestrator plugin that auto-chains GSD -> Superpowers -> sg-retro so planning, implementation, and retrospection stay connected as a single learning loop.

entry.title: ai-ads-os
entry.content: AI Ads OS — a senior paid-media team in your Claude Code terminal. Meta strategists, Google Ads specialists, creative-fatigue analysts, GA4 attribution experts, Shopify ops leads. 36 expert-authored AI marketing playbooks across Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok, LinkedIn, Bing, GA4, Shopify, Klaviyo & Search Console + 8 morning-workflow slash commands. OAuth-secured live data via the GoMarble MCP server.

entry.title: agenthub-connector-plugin
entry.content: Connect Claude Code to AgentHub Enterprise, fetch onboarding metadata, build install plans, install recommended skills, and run Harness workflows.

entry.title: honey
entry.content: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost: less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON). Plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents that return compressed handoffs. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; correctness and safety-critical paths stay exact.

entry.title: ai-media-buyer
entry.content: AI Media Buyer — a senior media-buying agent for Claude Code. 36 expert-authored playbooks across Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok, LinkedIn, Bing, GA4, Shopify, Klaviyo & Search Console + 8 morning-workflow slash commands. OAuth-secured live data via the GoMarble MCP server.

entry.title: vibeagent-dev
entry.content: VibeAgent 클라우드 프로젝트를 로컬에서 이어 개발하기 위한 스킬 + 원격 MCP 커넥터(secretless proxy).

entry.title: superopc
entry.content: SuperOPC — The One-Person Company Operating System. AI-powered workflow, agents, skills, and multi-runtime exports for solo founders who build, ship, and grow without a team.

entry.title: braynee
entry.content: Braynee turns Claude Code into your second brain — setup wizard, PARA vault scaffolding, company knowledge base, project detection, all-time usage insights, and daily workflow skills. Requires Claude Code ≥ 2.1.85 (hooks use the `if` field for tool/argument scoping).

entry.title: agentic-peer-review
entry.content: Iterative AI peer review that finds and fixes issues in your codebase

entry.title: strata
entry.content: Typed, local-first memory for Claude Code — decisions, domain rules, and runbooks Claude reads on its own. Human-confirmed writes, read-only MCP, benchmarked supersession-aware recall. Branch/PR-aware and team-shareable.

entry.title: pylsp
entry.content: Register python-lsp-server (pylsp) as the Python LSP, with pylsp-mypy for type diagnostics. Includes a fallback mypy hook in case the harness doesn't honor plugin LSP configs.

entry.title: claude-commands
entry.content: LLM Capital Efficiency Framework: 145+ production-tested slash commands for autonomous development workflows, PR automation, and multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: arc
entry.content: The full arc from idea to shipped code. Lifecycle workflows for vision, ideation, implementation, review, testing, audit, launch, and commits.

entry.title: looker
entry.content: Connect to Looker and interact with your data using LookML.

entry.title: quality-strategy
entry.content: Produce and use a software quality strategy — who matters, what they value, where you're exposed, and what to do about it — plus the test and tooling strategies that operationalise it, and shareable visual artefacts generated from it. Grounded in the Tollens quality framework.

entry.title: learnship
entry.content: Agentic engineering done right — 57 structured workflows, 17 specialist agent personas, persistent memory across sessions, integrated learning partner, and impeccable UI design system. Works with Claude Code, Windsurf, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Codex.

entry.title: song2html-claude-plugin
entry.content: Read, write, parse, validate, transpose, and render song chord charts using the song2html format.

entry.title: micropython
entry.content: A plugin to interact with MicroPython devices within Claude

entry.title: open-skilled-sdd
entry.content: Open Spec-driven development workflow for Claude Code: OpenSpec, PRPs, Spec Kit, spec-workflow-mcp, BMad-Method, 6A workflow.

entry.title: agentic-senior-core
entry.content: Universal AI coding rules. Write code like a staff engineer.

entry.title: harness-trace
entry.content: Agent behavior recording layer for Claude Code — local-first JSONL, side-effect only, uploads to team backend

entry.title: ccmem
entry.content: Claude Code Memory System - File-based learning and memory management

entry.title: plumbline
entry.content: Code that runs true under agentic maintenance

entry.title: sentinel-governance
entry.content: Sentinel - Governance rules enforcement plugin for Claude Code. Syncs organizational coding standards and policies into your Claude Code sessions.

entry.title: watchmen
entry.content: Surface skill suggestions + workspace context from watchmen sessions intelligence into your Claude Code sessions

entry.title: claudemux
entry.content: Multi-repo Claude Code orchestrator. Run one dispatcher session in the parent of your repos; spawn, message, and wait on tmux teammates across them — all from one place.

entry.title: harmony
entry.content: Declarative config for Claude Code. One manifest, full lifecycle (install + uninstall), per-Mac reconciliation.

entry.title: mitable
entry.content: Customer, product, and operating context for Forward Deployed Engineers — automatically maintained, automatically loaded.

entry.title: nativeui
entry.content: Author native iOS + Android apps with NativeUI: generate plain HTML/CSS, import it to a NativeUI project, export native screens, and wire backend through the NuiBackend interface without touching generated UI.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: AI job search command center: evaluate offers, generate CVs, scan portals, track applications. Uses your local Claude Code subscription.

entry.title: claude-handoff
entry.content: Continue the same Claude Code session across two machines: sync the transcript with Syncthing, then resume it on the other machine with one command.

entry.title: claude-automemory
entry.content: Persistent session recall for Claude Code: orient, search, list, show transcripts via stdlib Python + SessionStart hook

entry.title: agentsource-plugin
entry.content: B2B prospecting via the AgentSource API — find companies/prospects, enrich with firmographics/contacts, track business events, export to CSV at scale.

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: AWS services monitor and interaction plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: project-brain
entry.content: A professional OpenClaude project-brain plugin with six-layer persistent knowledge architecture, retrieval routing, self-correction scanning, knowledge compression, Obsidian vault sync, and measurable brain health metrics.

entry.title: relay
entry.content: Cross-project issue routing and work handoff between sessions, tools, and people

entry.title: flevinsky-ai
entry.content: Declare, run, and observe long-running dev services across Claude Code, Pi, and other agents

entry.title: dude
entry.content: Ultra-minimal RAG and cross-project memory for Claude CLI

entry.title: hello-world
entry.content: Exhaustive reference plugin exercising every Claude Code plugin feature: hooks, skills, commands, agents, MCP servers, bin executables, and background monitors. Every component logs to /tmp/hello-world-plugin.log for easy debugging.

entry.title: hald
entry.content: Your codebase, held. GraphRAG-powered codebase intelligence for git repositories. Ask questions about architectural decisions, find domain experts, trace code evolution, and surface hidden coupling.

entry.title: nanostack
entry.content: Minimal AI coding agent team skills for the full engineering workflow: think, plan, review, test, audit, ship

entry.title: phoenix-otel
entry.content: Export Claude Code session traces to Phoenix (Arize) via OpenTelemetry

entry.title: specular
entry.content: Agent-driven development workflow with Linear as the source of truth: specify, plan, and run an autonomous implement loop.

entry.title: e2e-runner
entry.content: JSON-driven E2E browser test runner — no JavaScript test files needed. Parallel execution against a Chrome pool (browserless, CDP, Lightpanda, Obscura, Steel), 28+ built-in actions, visual verification, network debugging, flaky test detection, reusable modules, and a real-time dashboard. Includes 3 specialized agents, 4 slash commands, and 17 MCP tools.

entry.title: gr
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for video analysis, deep research, content extraction, web search, and explainer video creation — powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash.

entry.title: librarian
entry.content: Navigate the Claude Code plugin ecosystem with awareness before install

entry.title: stitch-kit
entry.content: Design superpowers for Claude Code — 35 skills that teach your agent to ideate, research, generate, iterate, and ship beautiful UIs using Google Stitch MCP.

entry.title: hs
entry.content: Pre-execution safety layer that blocks dangerous shell commands and credential file reads using pattern matching + LLM analysis. Fail-closed design.

entry.title: rig-wiki
entry.content: Rig skill for `rig wiki` knowledge-base operations.

entry.title: lisa
entry.content: LLM-powered epic workflows. Spec, research, plan, then execute with fresh sub-agents per phase. Like Ralph, but smarter.

entry.title: forma
entry.content: Design Intelligence Framework. Multi-agent design reasoning with 67 UI styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 163 industry profiles, 10 psychology triggers, 20 component blueprints, and W3C design token output. Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient, design system, design tokens.

entry.title: lanework
entry.content: Drive your .agents/reviews Kanban board through an AI-Driven Development Lifecycle — create review checklists, tick decisions, and advance status — backed by the lanework MCP server.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: bsession
entry.content: Drive the bsession headed-browser engine over HTTP; build Cloudflare/CAPTCHA-aware browser skills.

entry.title: promptup
entry.content: AI coding skill evaluator — 11-dimension session scoring, decision tracking, PR reports

entry.title: vibebreak
entry.content: Lock your AI sessions every N tokens until you move. Phone counts reps and posts a BeReal-style snap to your friends.

entry.title: claudetalk
entry.content: Inter-Claude messaging over MCP — also exposes the claude/channel capability so peer messages push into your session in real time (no hook polling).

entry.title: ultraswarm
entry.content: Durable multi-worker coding orchestration with supervised CLIs, metric routing, transactional integration, recovery, and explicit approvals.

entry.title: radar
entry.content: AI workflow intelligence — analyzes your coding sessions, scans the ecosystem, and recommends improvements relevant to you.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,358 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,427 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: mac-security-suite
entry.content: Read-only, on-demand macOS security harness — scan, egress firewall (LuLu), persistence diffing (KnockKnock), malware triage (ClamAV/YARA/capa/VirusTotal), and hardening audit (Lynis/mSCP). Baseline-and-diff, no resident daemons, no self-surveillance.

entry.title: grok-build
entry.content: Run the Grok Build CLI (xAI) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, live web/X search) to Grok. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entry.title: assistant-burst-summary-hook
entry.content: Claude Code hooks that summarize quiet Telegram assistant bursts after voice notes.

entry.title: bonsai
entry.content: Worktree lifecycle as a cross-platform CLI: create a worktree + branch off the freshest default, set it up from a .bonsai file list, and tear it down behind a hard safety gate that keeps non-integrated work and warns on orphaned commits or interference. Skills: bonsai (create+setup), setup, prune.

entry.title: feature-loop
entry.content: Autonomous build → verify → fix loop on top of the agent-skills plugin.

entry.title: netwatch
entry.content: Cyberpunk-themed tmux agent dashboard — tracks Claude Code session state via hooks and exposes it through a daemon + Textual HUD

entry.title: tmux-pilot
entry.content: Control interactive CLI programs through tmux panes with intelligent output monitoring

entry.title: reflection-cc
entry.content: Re-prompts Claude Code when it stops prematurely — catches PERMISSION-SEEKING, STOPPED-WITH-TODOS, and FALSE-COMPLETE failure modes, and injects targeted recovery instructions.

entry.title: macos-dev
entry.content: macOS app development with SwiftUI and AppKit, including Liquid Glass adoption, framework interop, and the 2025/2026 design system. Bundles curated Apple Developer documentation.

entry.title: rtk-plugin
entry.content: Transparent token compression for Claude Code shell calls. Wraps RTK with lazy binary download and adds verticals RTK does not cover (Terraform, etc.).

entry.title: cuckoo
entry.content: Durable personal calendar for Claude Code — date/time reminders that resurface at your next session on/after the due date.

entry.title: unanet
entry.content: Automate Unanet timesheet entry via Playwright and Okta SSO with 1Password credentials

entry.title: oh-my-team
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. 12 specialized agents working in parallel — planning, building, reviewing, debugging. Plus a Hub for always-alive multi-project sessions controllable from Telegram or Slack.

entry.title: intervision
entry.content: Bring another coding agent in as a peer to review work just done or just discussed. Claude hands work to Codex; Codex hands work to Claude. Intervision is peer consultation among equals, not supervision from above.

entry.title: jj-claude-plugin
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Jujutsu — HUD status line, jj workflows, and optional SPR stacked PR support

entry.title: agent-completion-chime
entry.content: Make a sound when AI agents finish. Per-agent chime on Stop / SubagentStop, all-complete chime when the active-agent set drains. Configurable via 9 MCP tools (chime_status, chime_list_sounds, chime_set_per_agent_sound, chime_set_all_complete_sound, chime_set_volume, chime_enable, chime_disable, chime_test, chime_reset_active). macOS only.

entry.title: ledger
entry.content: Execution as Proof for money — the deterministic correctness layer AI agents call. Exact Money.from (no floats), kernel-enforced double-entry via JournalEntry + validateEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, canon citations. Provides /ledger-* skills and slash commands.

entry.title: onepg
entry.content: YAML resume builder with auto-fit PDF rendering

entry.title: arkive
entry.content: A living architecture document for AI-built projects. Your AI agent maintains it; you understand what was built.

entry.title: llm-externalizer
entry.content: MCP server that offloads bounded LLM tasks from Claude Code to cheaper local (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp) or remote (OpenRouter) models. Profile-based configuration with ensemble mode.

entry.title: wordpress-expert
entry.content: Expert WordPress diagnostics and site builder: structured investigations with intake questioning, site reconnaissance, parallel execution, findings verification, WordPress site generation as Local WP importable zips, and interactive modification sessions.

entry.title: autonomous
entry.content: Keep an autonomous mission running across turns. A startup capability probe decides whether keep-alive machinery is needed: a cron heartbeat with exponential backoff, auto-stop, and wake/restore for an interactive session; nothing for a persistent process. The rover plugin's decision framework calls this layer at dispatch.

entry.title: aigentry-devkit
entry.content: AI development environment kit: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and HUD for Claude Code and Codex CLI

entry.title: attest
entry.content: Verifies a subagent's Status: DONE / ## Handoff claim against the real git working-tree delta and blocks a DONE whose claimed files never landed. Deterministic, zero-LLM, fail-open.

entry.title: aiad-sdd
entry.content: AIAD SDD Mode — Spec Driven Development pour Claude Code : cycle Intent → Research → SPEC → Gate → Exec → Validate → Drift-Lock, gouvernance Tier 1 enforced, verdicts déterministes.

entry.title: session-sync
entry.content: Sync Claude Code conversations to Effective sessions

entry.title: claude-vault
entry.content: Secure secrets handling for Claude Code - run API calls without exposing keys in session logs

entry.title: swarp
entry.content: Agent orchestration platform — deploy remote Claude agents

entry.title: claude-next-idle
entry.content: Detects idle Claude sessions for keyboard-shortcut cycling

entry.title: how-plugins-work
entry.content: Reference for plugin naming, skill resolution, Claude/Codex adapter sync, marketplace aliases, runtime caches, and plugin:skill invocation.

entry.title: service-knowledge-contour
entry.content: Maintain a minimal service knowledge contour with canonical docs, generated overlays, audits, promotion, and pruning.

entry.title: mitm
entry.content: Interactive MITM proxy with rule engine, traffic inspection, and request/response transforms

entry.title: tink
entry.content: A small harness layer for Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: vsdd-factory
entry.content: Verified Spec-Driven Development (VSDD) dark factory for software — full SDLC pipeline: brownfield ingest, spec crystallization, story decomposition, TDD delivery, adversarial review, holdout evaluation, formal verification, and release gating.

entry.title: xcindex
entry.content: Query Xcode's pre-built symbol index from Claude Code. Surgical, semantic Swift/ObjC symbol lookups — find references, definitions, overrides, conformances, and blast radius without reading full files.

entry.title: sub-claude
entry.content: Session-oriented pool of persistent Claude TUI slots backed by tmux

entry.title: anger-management
entry.content: Cuss at your coding agent to capture a one-line friction note, then fix the real problem later. The cuss commands (/fuck, /fucking, /fucked, /shit, /crap, /wtf, /bullshit) append one cheap line to a global log and move on; safeword commands (/safeword, /pineapple, /pineapplejuice, /pinapplejuice, /flugelhorn, /banana) interrupt current work and fix one visible friction point now without logging it for later. /anger-management:repair cools down (~22 min, a background headless agent investigates), reads the full capture history, scores confidence, chooses the mitigation layer and target scope, and only applies or routes a fix when confidence is high enough. Lower-confidence findings leave the breadcrumb trail open for a future pass. Modelled on Stripe's bad-day button, course-correction-before-escalation, and the constructed-emotion view of anger; sometimes the irritation is real, sometimes it is playful. Vocabulary avoids slurs and identity-targeted abuse. State is stored locally; the optional background investigation uses the configured runner.

entry.title: memory-rlm
entry.content: Persistent project memory for Claude Code

entry.title: aidlc
entry.content: AWS AI-DLC adaptive workflow as Claude Code slash commands, plus the awslabs AI-DLC rule bundle installer.

entry.title: newsjack
entry.content: Open-source skills that turn your coding agent into a PR operator — strategize positioning, detect newsjackable stories in your space, and react with on-brand pitches and comments.

entry.title: don-cheli-sdd
entry.content: Full SDD (Spec-Driven Development) framework for Claude Code. 72+ slash commands (/dc:*), 14 reusable skills, 15 reasoning models, TDD as an iron law, and i18n support (ES/EN/PT). Turn requirements into tested, documented, production-ready code through 7 disciplined lifecycle phases.

entry.title: draft
entry.content: Context-Driven Development: draft specs and plans before implementation. Structured workflows for features and fixes.

entry.title: clipboard
entry.content: Copy core content of the last answer to the macOS clipboard via the clipboard-copy helper (pbcopy for plain, pbcopy-html for Slack rich text).

entry.title: rover
entry.content: Dispatch a rover at a task and stay back while it decides in the field: a SURVEY/DRIVE/INSPECT/STOW phase machine with a decide framework, pride and trim quality gates, verify evidence discipline, prepare for queuing missions across repos, and a stop communique. Asks the autonomous layer at startup whether it needs to keep itself alive. Depends on gurus for the INSPECT panel review.

entry.title: apartment-finder
entry.content: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entry.title: wsl-ssh-agent
entry.content: Bridges Windows SSH agent to WSL for SSH/SCP/Git operations. Works with 1Password, native Windows OpenSSH agent, and other SSH agent implementations.

entry.title: ruler-engine
entry.content: Pluggable rule-injection engine: loads .claude-rules/ruler.yml from target project and injects rules via UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse hooks. Engine-only, zero business rules.

entry.title: perfect-skill-suggester
entry.content: High-accuracy skill activation (88%+) with Dewey-like domain classification, dynamic tool catalog from skill index, weighted scoring, and three-tier confidence routing.
